content: الأكل كله باطل عشان إنت سبتة بره التلاجة
translations: eng:the food is ruined because you left it out of the fridge

transcriptions.arabizi: il'aklakull|uh baaz Aalashaen 'inta sibt|uh barrah iltallaega
